text:
This patch depends on ports/109341.

- Update to 0.1.3
- Change MASTER_SITES for distfile
Dear maintainer, if you want to host at http://dist.bsdlab.org/ ,
feel free to download the distfile and change MASTER_SITES)

Port maintainer (kuriyama@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.
